SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Backend.Helpers

Class QuickStateManager

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Helpers.QuickStateManager
public final class QuickStateManager extends Object
Persists managed save-state slots per ROM identity.

  • Method Details

    • Save

      public static void Save(ROM rom, QuickStateManager.QuickStateData quickStateData) throws IOException
      Writes the quick slot for the supplied ROM.
      Parameters:
      rom - loaded ROM identity
      quickStateData - state payload
      Throws:
      IOException - when the state cannot be written

    • Save

      public static void Save(ROM rom, int slot, QuickStateManager.QuickStateData quickStateData) throws IOException
      Writes a managed state file for the supplied ROM and slot.
      Parameters:
      rom - loaded ROM identity
      slot - save-state slot from 0 to 9
      quickStateData - state payload
      Throws:
      IOException - when the state cannot be written

    • Load

      public static QuickStateManager.QuickStateData Load(ROM rom) throws IOException
      Loads the quick slot for the supplied ROM.
      Parameters:
      rom - loaded ROM identity
      Returns:
      state payload
      Throws:
      IOException - when the state cannot be found or read

    • Load

      public static QuickStateManager.QuickStateData Load(ROM rom, int slot) throws IOException
      Loads a managed state file for the supplied ROM and slot.
      Parameters:
      rom - loaded ROM identity
      slot - save-state slot from 0 to 9
      Returns:
      state payload
      Throws:
      IOException - when the state cannot be found or read

      public static Path QuickStatePath(ROM rom)
      Returns the quick slot path for a ROM.
      Parameters:
      rom - loaded ROM identity
      Returns:
      quick-slot path

      public static Path QuickStatePath(ROM rom, int slot)
      Returns the managed save-state slot path for a ROM.
      Parameters:
      rom - loaded ROM identity
      slot - save-state slot from 0 to 9
      Returns:
      save-state path

      Returns the managed save-state slot path for a ROM identity.

      quickStateIdentity - ROM identity
      slot - save-state slot from 0 to 9
      Returns:
      save-state path

    • DescribeSlots

      public static List<QuickStateManager.StateSlotInfo> DescribeSlots(ROM rom)
      Describes every managed slot for the supplied ROM.
      Parameters:
      rom - loaded ROM identity
      Returns:
      slot metadata in slot order

    • DescribeSlots

      public static List<QuickStateManager.StateSlotInfo> DescribeSlots(QuickStateManager.QuickStateIdentity quickStateIdentity)
      Describes every managed slot for the supplied ROM identity.
      Parameters:
      quickStateIdentity - ROM identity
      Returns:
      slot metadata in slot order

    • ImportState

      public static void ImportState(QuickStateManager.QuickStateIdentity quickStateIdentity, int slot, Path sourcePath) throws IOException
      Imports an external save-state file into the managed slot.
      Parameters:
      quickStateIdentity - ROM identity
      slot - save-state slot from 0 to 9
      sourcePath - external save-state file
      Throws:
      IOException - when the file cannot be imported

    • ExportState

      public static void ExportState(QuickStateManager.QuickStateIdentity quickStateIdentity, int slot, Path destinationPath) throws IOException
      Exports the managed save-state slot to an external file.
      Parameters:
      quickStateIdentity - ROM identity
      slot - save-state slot from 0 to 9
      destinationPath - external destination
      Throws:
      IOException - when the state cannot be exported

    • DeleteState

      public static void DeleteState(QuickStateManager.QuickStateIdentity quickStateIdentity, int slot) throws IOException
      Deletes one managed save-state slot.
      Parameters:
      quickStateIdentity - ROM identity
      slot - save-state slot from 0 to 9
      Throws:
      IOException - when deletion fails

    • DeleteAllStates

      public static void DeleteAllStates(QuickStateManager.QuickStateIdentity quickStateIdentity) throws IOException
      Deletes all managed save-state slots for a ROM identity.
      Parameters:
      quickStateIdentity - ROM identity
      Throws:
      IOException - when deletion fails

    • MoveState

      public static void MoveState(QuickStateManager.QuickStateIdentity quickStateIdentity, int sourceSlot, int targetSlot) throws IOException
      Moves one managed save-state slot to another slot for the same ROM.
      Parameters:
      quickStateIdentity - ROM identity
      sourceSlot - source slot from 0 to 9
      targetSlot - target slot from 0 to 9
      Throws:
      IOException - when the move cannot be completed
